revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{各世紀の人物 (職業別)}} {{commons cat multi|7th-century people by occupation}} 7世紀の人物 (職業別)に関するカテゴリ。 {{see also|en:Category:7th-century people by occupation}}
{{デフォルトソート:しんふつ}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:7世紀の人物 (職業別)]]|version=86494919}} [[ja:Category:7世紀の人物 (職業別)]]
==Old Content== redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]]
[[en:Category:7th-century people by occupation]] [[en:Category:7th-century people by occupation]]
[[ja:Category:7世紀の人物 (職業別)]] [[ar:Category:أشخاص في القرن 7 حسب المهنة]] [[bn:Category:পেশা অনুযায়ী ৭ম শতাব্দীর ব্যক্তি]] [[commons:Category:7th-century people by occupation]] [[cy:Category:Pobl y 7fed ganrif yn ôl galwedigaeth]] [[de:Category:Person (7. Jahrhundert) nach Tätigkeit]] [[fa:Category:اهالی سده ۷ (میلادی) بر پایه پیشه]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité du VIIe siècle par activité]] [[ko:Category:직업별 7세기 사람]] [[mk:Category:Луѓе од 7 век по занимање]] [[mn:Category:7-р зууны хүн ажил үйлээр]] [[pt:Category:Pessoas do século VII por ocupação]] [[ro:Category:Oameni din secolul al VII-lea după ocupație]] [[ru:Category:Персоналии VII века по роду занятий]] [[sv:Category:Personer under 600-talet efter yrke]] [[tr:Category:7. yüzyılda uğraşına göre kişiler]] [[ur:Category:ساتویں صدی کی شخصیات بلحاظ پیشہ]] [[zh:Category:7世纪各职业人物]] {{translated page|ja|Category:7世紀の人物 (職業別)|version=86494919|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]]
[[Category:Tier 4 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8212738)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

Jahrhundert) nach Tätigkeit]] [[en:Category:7th-century people by occupation]] [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[fa:Category:اهالی سده ۷ (میلادی) بر پایه پیشه]] [[fa:Category:رده:اهالی سده ۷ (میلادی) بر پایه پیشه]] [[fr:Category:Catégorie:Personnalité du VIIe siècle par activité]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité du VIIe siècle par activité]] [[ja:Category:7世紀の人物 (職業別)]] [[ko:Category:분류:직업별 7세기 사람]] [[ko:Category:직업별 7세기 사람]] [[mk:Category:Категорија:Луѓе од 7 век по занимање]] [[mk:Category:Луѓе од 7 век по занимање]] [[mn:Category:7-р зууны хүн ажил үйлээр]] [[mn:Category:Ангилал:7-р зууны хүн ажил үйлээр]] [[pt:Category:Categoria:Pessoas do século VII por ocupação]] [[pt:Category:Pessoas do século VII por ocupação]] [[ro:Category:Categorie:Oameni din secolul al VII-lea după ocupație]] [[ro:Category:Oameni din secolul al VII-lea după ocupație]] [[ru:Category:Категория:Персоналии VII века по роду занятий]] [[ru:Category:Персоналии VII века по роду занятий]] [[sv:Category:Kategori:Personer under 600-talet efter yrke]] [[sv:Category:Personer under 600-talet efter yrke]] [[tr:Category:7. yüzyılda uğraşına göre kişiler]] [[tr:Category:Kategori:7. yüzyılda uğraşına göre kişiler]] [[ur:Category:زمرہ:ساتویں صدی کی شخصیات بلحاظ پیشہ]] [[ur:Category:ساتویں صدی کی شخصیات بلحاظ پیشہ]] [[zh:Category:7世纪各职业人物]] [[zh:Category:Category:7世纪各职业人物]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Tier 4 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories with enwiki]]
